disputed_language: This allows service ownership to move away from the management account while keeping the delegation boundary explicit. The tradeoff is operational: each selected service still has its own configuration, Region behavior, and evidence requirements.
explanation: Approved evidence supports service-specific administrative capabilities, not transfer of service ownership or a universal cross-service configuration/Region/evidence proposition.
required_action: Use bounded administrative responsibility language and remove the unsupported universal sentence.

supporting_source.locator: Delegated administrator for AWS services that work with Organizations
supporting_source.title: Delegated administrator for AWS services that work with Organizations
